deduplicateAcrossTabGroups.name: Deduplicate across tab groups
deduplicateAcrossTabGroups.description: Whether to switch to already open file even if its in a split pane or popout window

deduplicateTabs.name: Prevent duplicate tabs
deduplicateTabs.description: If a tab is already open, switch to it instead of re-opening it.

disableOnDevice.name: Disable on this device
disableOnDevice.description: When enabled, this plugin does nothing on the current device. This setting is per-device and is not synced. Restart Obsidian or toggle the plugin off and on to apply.
disableOnDevice.notice: Restart Obsidian for disable on this device to take effect

focusNewTabs.name: Focus explicit new tabs
focusNewTabs.description: Immediately switch to new tabs opened via middle or ctrl click instead of opening them in the background. New tabs created by regular click will always focus regardless.

newTabTabGroupPlacement.name: New tab tab group placement
newTabTabGroupPlacement.description: When the workspace is split, prefer to open new tabs...

openInNewTab.name: Always open in new tab
openInNewTab.description: Open files in a new tab by default.

previewTabs.name: Preview tabs
previewTabs.description: VS Code style preview tabs. Initially open tabs as "preview" until interacted with. Preview tabs will be replaced instead of opening in new tab.
